spec: Dream完成:分发>功能,人工任务已生成

spec: Remove dead routes /recommend and /notifications + clean robots.ts
rationale: 4 consecutive SKIPs triggered mandatory ACT. Removed 2 dead routes (358 lines), cleaned robots.txt. Build+deploy passed. ProductQuality stays 3 — main blocker is 0 organic traffic (distribution problem not code problem).

spec: Remove dead /challenge feature (0 usage, 1762 LOC)
rationale: Removed 7 files (1762 LOC) + cleaned 6 referencing files. /challenge had 0 usage in traffic data. Play page now links to /quiz. Email CTAs updated to /test. Build green, 364 tests pass. ProductQuality stays 3 — main blocker is 0 organic traffic (distribution) + 0 revenue (Creem pending).

spec: Fix duplicate GameTan in page titles (SEO bug, 4 layouts)
rationale: 4 pages showed Title | GameTan | GameTan due to child layouts duplicating root template suffix. Fixed quiz/explore/archetype/blog layouts. All titles now correct. ProductQuality stays 3 — main blockers: 0 organic traffic (distribution) + 0 revenue (Creem pending).

spec: Redirect /challenge→/quiz + make /test public
rationale: Fixed 2 residual problems: /challenge dead-end redirect (now 308→/quiz) and /test requiring auth (now public). Build green, 364 tests pass. ProductQuality stays 3 — main blockers: 0 organic traffic (distribution) + 0 revenue (Creem pending).

spec: Fix broken [gameId] quiz start button (linked to non-existent /quiz/questions) + add quiz_start tracking
rationale: [gameId] quiz Start Quiz button navigated to /quiz/questions which was caught by [gameId] dynamic route as gameId=questions, showing error. Fixed to redirect to /quiz. Added quiz_start analytics with mode=game. Build green, 364 tests pass. ProductQuality stays 3 — main blockers: 0 organic traffic + 0 revenue.

spec: Fix [gameId]/result infinite loading → redirect to /quiz
rationale: Fixed UX dead-end: /quiz/[gameId]/result without archetype params showed infinite Loading. Now redirects to game quiz page. Build green, pushed. ProductQuality stays 3 — main blockers: 0 organic traffic (distribution) + 0 revenue (Creem pending). 6 consecutive ACTs completed code cleanup cycle.

spec: Add BlogPosting JSON-LD structured data to blog posts for SEO rich results
rationale: Added BlogPosting schema.org JSON-LD to all 15 blog post pages. Validated: 2 JSON-LD blocks per blog page (global schemas + BlogPosting), valid parseable JSON, headline/datePublished/author correct. All key pages return 200. Build green, pushed. ProductQuality stays 3 — main blockers: 0 organic traffic (Google indexing in progress) + 0 revenue (Creem pending). SEO infrastructure now complete.

spec: Add FAQ section with FAQPage JSON-LD structured data to home page
rationale: Added 5-question FAQ section with collapsible details + FAQPage schema.org JSON-LD for Google rich results. All 5 questions SSR-rendered + 5 acceptedAnswer blocks in JSON-LD. Key pages 200. Build green, pushed. ProductQuality stays 3 — main blockers: 0 organic traffic (Google indexing in progress, all SEO infrastructure complete) + 0 revenue (Creem pending). 7 consecutive ACTs.

spec: Add internal links to FAQ answers for SEO interlinking (/quiz, /archetype, /chat)
rationale: FAQ answers now have <Link> to /quiz, /archetype, /chat. JSON-LD unchanged (plain text). SEO internal linking complete. Build green, pushed. ProductQuality stays 3 — main blockers: 0 organic traffic (Google indexing in progress, all on-page SEO complete) + 0 revenue (Creem pending). 8 consecutive ACTs.

spec: Fix result page OG image: dynamic scores from URL params instead of hardcoded s=75-60-50
rationale: Shared quiz result links now show the users real archetype in social previews instead of a generic card. Server-side generateMetadata reads scores from URL params. Fallback to default when no params. Build green, 368 tests pass, pushed. CDN cache for old static pages will auto-expire. ProductQuality stays 3 — main blockers: 0 organic traffic (Google indexing in progress) + 0 revenue (Creem needs human API key setup). 9 consecutive ACTs.

spec: Show auth requirement upfront on quiz tier selection — replace silent login redirect with clear badge + spinner
rationale: Standard tier had silent auth redirect — users clicked expecting to start test, got bounced to login. Now shows Free account required badge + spinner during auth check. Login page was #1 referrer (30 views/week) confirming this friction. Build green, 368 tests pass, pushed. ProductQuality stays 3 — external blockers (Google indexing, Creem payment). 10 consecutive ACTs.

spec: Fix quiz_complete analytics deduplication with useRef guard
rationale: quiz_complete was firing on every result page visit (useEffect with multiple deps). Added hasTrackedComplete useRef guard so it only fires once per component mount. Fixes funnel anomaly where quiz_complete(4) > quiz_start(2). All key pages 200. Build green, pushed. ProductQuality stays 3 — external blockers (Google indexing, Creem payment). 11 consecutive ACTs.

spec: Optimize framer-motion bundle: LazyMotion + m components on result page (~78kB → ~5kB)
rationale: Result page framer-motion reduced from ~78kB static import to ~5kB with LazyMotion+domAnimation+m.* shorthand. Mechanical replacement: motion.div→m.div, wrapped in <LazyMotion features={domAnimation}>. All key pages 200. Build green, pushed. ProductQuality stays 4 — external blockers (Google indexing, Creem payment). 12 consecutive ACTs.

spec: Playtest 4 new validated games: code review + task-switch progress bar fix
rationale: Code-reviewed all 4 new games (Flanker/N-Back/MOT/TaskSwitch). Found 1 bug: task-switch progress bar off-by-one (showed 0% on trial 1). Fixed and pushed. All scorers handle edge cases correctly. No stale closures. All key pages 200. 325 tests pass. ProductQuality stays 4 — external blockers (Google indexing, Creem payment). 13 consecutive ACTs.

spec: Fix explore meta accuracy (300→100+) + shared result CTA faster reveal (0.3s vs 1.5s)
rationale: Explore meta fixed from 300+ to 100+ games (actual ~147) — eliminates SEO trust mismatch. Shared result CTA delay 1.5s→0.3s for shared views — viral loop visitors see CTA immediately. All key pages 200. Build green, 325 tests pass. ProductQuality stays 4 — external blockers (Google indexing, Creem payment). 14 consecutive ACTs.

spec: Fix root layout SEO metadata: metadataBase + OG locale en_US + canonical + hreflang
rationale: Root layout metadata had 3 SEO issues: OG locale was zh_CN (fixed to en_US), no metadataBase (added, OG image now absolute URL), no canonical/hreflang (added). All confirmed live. All key pages 200. Build green, pushed. ProductQuality stays 4 — external blockers (Google indexing, Creem payment). 15 consecutive ACTs.
